description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker with a predominantly black upper, featuring three subtle black stripes on the side, characteristic of Adidas design. The midsole is split into two bold colors: red at the front and blue at the heel, with a black stabilizing element at the midfoot. The shoe has a low-cut profile, a padded collar, and a black lace-up closure with a standard criss-cross lacing style. The heel tab displays the text 'KARELKIERS.COM' in white, and the outsole appears textured for grip. The overall construction suggests a combination of synthetic mesh, rubber, and foam, designed for comfort and urban wear.
description: A black athletic sneaker with red and blue midsole accents, subtle Adidas stripes, and a branded heel tab. It features a modern, sporty design with a textured sole and standard lacing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black upper, three black stripes, red forefoot midsole, blue heel midsole, and black stabilizer.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, black laces, and red midsole edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, but the stripes are less visible and the blue heel midsole is more prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the blue heel, black collar, and the 'KARELKIERS.COM' text on the heel tab.
attribute_logo: Three black stripes on the side panels; Adidas logo on the tongue (barely visible); 'KARELKIERS.COM' text on the heel tab in white.
